rules.rule_text: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials).
